overview.description: The EA Astoria Dynamic Core US Fixed Income ETF (AGGA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed, fund-of-funds investing in a broad range of US fixed income ETFs. The fund aims to provide core fixed income exposure while seeking to outperform broad-based fixed income benchmarks AGGA was launched on Apr 30, 2025 and is issued by Astoria.
